name: Zesty Grilled Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 rib or loin pork chops, 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large resealable plastic bag or shallow glass container, combine the first five ingredients and mix well.
2. Remove 1/4 cup of the marinade for basting and refrigerate it.
3. Add the pork chops to the remaining marinade and turn to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or overnight, turning once.
4. Drain the pork chops, discarding the marinade.
5. Grill, uncovered, over medium-hot heat for 4 minutes.
6. Turn the chops and baste with the reserved marinade.
7. Grill an additional 4-7 minutes longer, or until juices run clear.
